title: Vendor & Workshop Intelligence
subtitle: Objective performance ranking for tyre brands and workshop sites - cost efficiency, reliability, and procurement intelligence

vendor.emptyThreshold: No brand records meet the minimum record threshold ({minRecords}).
vendor.cpkChartSub: Green ≤1.0 · Amber 1-2 · Red ≥2 - sorted best to worst
vendor.cpkChartEmpty: No valid CPK data (requires km_at_fitment, km_at_removal, cost_per_tyre)
vendor.failureChartSub: High + Critical risk as % of total records

workshop.emptyThreshold: No workshop data meets the minimum record threshold ({minRecords}).
workshop.riskChartSub: High + Critical risk records as % of site total
workshop.cpkChartSub: Higher CPK = more expensive per km driven
workshop.closeChartTitle: Corrective Action Close Rate by Site (%)
workshop.closeChartSub: % of corrective actions resolved - green ≥70% · amber 40-70% · red <40%

recommendations.title: Procurement Recommendations
recommendations.allGoodDesc: No critical procurement actions identified. Continue monitoring.

messages.highestCpk: {brand} has the highest CPK at {cpk}/km - significantly above fleet benchmark. Initiate replacement procurement evaluation.
messages.bestValue: {brand} delivers best value at {cpk}/km with {count} records. Consider increasing procurement share to reduce fleet cost.
messages.highFailure: {brand} shows {pct} failure rate (High + Critical risk). Conduct root cause analysis and review specifications before next procurement cycle.
messages.highScrap: {brand} has a {pct} scrap rate - indicative of premature removal or quality issues. Engineering review recommended.
messages.worstSiteRisk: {site} has the highest high-risk tyre rate at {pct}%. Schedule an immediate tyre audit and corrective action review for this site.
messages.zeroCloseRate: {site} has 0% corrective action close rate. Escalation to site management required - open actions are accumulating without resolution.
messages.slowCloseRate: {site} corrective action close rate is only {pct}. Set a 30-day resolution target and assign accountability for open actions.
messages.longestLife: {brand} achieves the longest average tyre life at {km}. Prioritise for steer and drive axles where durability delivers highest lifecycle value.

execSummary.title: Executive Summary
execSummary.bestValueNote: Lowest cost per km - recommended for increased procurement
execSummary.highestCostNote: Highest cost per km - evaluate specification or supplier change
execSummary.savingUnlock: Switch best and worst brand CPK to unlock saving estimate
execSummary.bestSiteNote: Benchmark site for fleet-wide best practices
execSummary.attentionNote: Schedule tyre audit and corrective action review
